AnalysisRecord.description: One statistical analysis the harness performed to test hypotheses.

hypothesis_ids.description: IDs of the hypotheses this analysis addresses.
hypothesis_ids.title: Hypothesis Ids

code.description: Optional: the code executed (for reasoning-trace audits).
code.title: Code

result_summary.description: Free-text summary of the statistical result.
result_summary.title: Result Summary

effect_estimate.description: Signed effect estimate on the outcome's natural scale. Scoring uses the sign to verify the direction matches ground truth.
effect_estimate.title: Effect Estimate

significant.description: Whether the harness deemed the result statistically significant. If omitted and p_value is present, scoring uses p < 0.05.
significant.title: Significant

AnalysisRecord.title: AnalysisRecord

HypothesisRecord.description: One hypothesis proposed by the harness within an iteration.
HypothesisRecord.title: HypothesisRecord

IterationRecord.description: One full iteration of the propose-analyze-refine loop.
IterationRecord.title: IterationRecord

description:
Top-level transcript emitted by an external harness.

A harness should emit exactly one file named ``transcript.json`` conforming
to this schema when it finishes a dataset.

harness_id.description: Identifier for the harness implementation and version (e.g. 'claude-code@2.3.1', 'codex-cli@0.8.0', 'custom-react@sha-deadbee').
harness_id.title: Harness Id

title: Transcript
